# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Security

## Verification

- [ ] `mvn clean test`
- [ ] Manual app launch
- [ ] SQL Server checked
- [ ] Report export checked
- [ ] UI screenshot attached if relevant

## Risk

Describe user-visible, data, crawler, AI, or security risks.

## Documentation

- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Configuration changes documented
- [ ] Database changes documented
- [ ] Security notes updated if needed

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] No unrelated formatting churn
- [ ] Error messages are user-safe
- [ ] AI-risk wording remains non-accusatory
- [ ] Crawler access boundaries are preserved
